info.address: Ngeme, Mile 4 Coastal Road, Limbe, Cameroon
info.secure_desc: Equipped with Starlink enterprise-grade connectivity to ensure 24/7 high-speed dialogue for global professional missions.

dining.title: Atlantic Gastronomy,
dining.description: Our menu is a sanctuary for the health-conscious mind. Every ingredient is strictly organic and pesticide-free, harvested directly from the nutrient-rich volcanic soils of the Fako region. From our unadulterated cold-pressed oils to our daily coastal catch, we serve only what is pure, seasonal, and chemically untouched, bringing you the true, vibrant energy of Cameroon.
dining.chef_note_quote: Every dish tells the story of our land, the volcanic richness that grows our spices, the Atlantic that gives us fish, and the hands of local farmers who have cultivated these flavors for generations. I invite you to taste Cameroon with us.

menuItems.name: Plantain Crisps with Spicy Kati-Kati
menuItems.description: Thinly sliced, fried plantains served with a fiery pepper sauce made from local kati-kati peppers.

menuItems.name: Mbongo Tchobi Prawns
menuItems.description: Juicy prawns simmered in a dark, aromatic Cameroonian spice broth, traditionally made with fresh crayfish and bitter herbs.

menuItems.name: Grassed Beef & Kati-Kati
menuItems.description: Tender beef fillet from grass-fed cattle, grilled over volcanic coals and glazed with a reduction of kati-kati peppers and local honey.

menuItems.name: Ndolé Vegetarian
menuItems.description: Creamy bitterleaf stew with peanuts, smoked fish (optional), and a medley of local vegetables. Served with boiled plantains or bobolo.

menuItems.name: Grilled Rockfish with Yellow Sauce
menuItems.description: Fresh Atlantic rockfish, grilled and topped with a vibrant yellow sauce made from turmeric, ginger, and palm oil. Served with vegetable rice.

hero.title: Our Story.
hero.description: On the volcanic shores of Limbe, New Waves Resort was born from a simple idea: that world-class hospitality can be a force for social change. Every stay here supports the Fisiy Foundation's mission to build accountable institutions across Africa.

impact_stats.label: Of profits to foundation
impact_stats.jobs_detail: Fair wages and training for community members

vision.title: Where Luxury Meets Purpose
vision.resort_desc: To create a sanctuary for the intellectual nomad, where world-class comfort inspires deep work, and where every guest becomes part of a larger story: the renewal of the social contract between citizens and their local governments across Africa.
vision.foundation_desc: To address deficits in local governance in Sub-Saharan Africa by fostering a culture of service, accountability and mutual respect, building inclusive, resilient institutions for responsive local engagement.

founder.name: Dr. Cyprian F. Fisiy
founder.bio:
Dr. Cyprian F. Fisiy is a Principal Social Scientist and Social Development Team Leader in the Africa Region of The World Bank. He has previously served as World Bank co-coordinator for Involuntary Resettlement (1997) and Resettlement Specialist for Africa (1994), working on investment programs in Lesotho, Chad, Cameroon and Côte d'Ivoire.

Prior to the World Bank, he conducted research on sustainable forest management in Cameroon and was a Research Fellow at the African Studies Center in Leiden and the University of Wageningen. He holds a Ph.D. in the Anthropology of Law from the University of Leiden (1992).

In 2014, Dr. Fisiy founded the Fisiy Foundation and Leadership Center in Washington DC as a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Ngeme Resort is his dream to create a sustainable funding engine for that mission, proving that hospitality can be a catalyst for accountable governance and community empowerment.

He resides in Alexandria with his wife, Grace Forgwei, and their four children.

programs.description: Through the Fisiy Foundation, a portion of New Wave Resort's profits directly fund these initiatives in Sub-Saharan Africa.

philosophy.title: Built for the
philosophy.description: Ngeme is more than a resort, it's a hub for writers, researchers, and entrepreneurs who seek both inspiration and infrastructure. Our coworking pavilions face the Atlantic, and our library holds volumes that spark dialogue between African thought leaders and the world.
philosophy.subdescription: Every element, from locally woven textiles to menus featuring indigenous ingredients, roots you in Cameroonian authenticity while delivering global standards of comfort.

hero.title: Seamless Infrastructure
hero.description: At Ngeme Resort, service is a silent partner to your productivity. We provide the logistics, security, and nourishment required for high-stakes intellectual work, all while honoring the volcanic soul of Cameroon.

service_list.title: Ocean-Side Intellectual Talks
service_list.description: Curated evening dialogues under the stars. We bring together global thinkers and local leaders to discuss governance, tech, and the future of Africa.

service_list.title: Atlantic Gastronomy
service_list.description: Farm-to-table excellence. Our chefs use volcanic-soil produce and fresh Atlantic catch to redefine Cameroonian fine dining.

service_list.title: Diplomatic Transfers
service_list.description: Seamless airport pickups from Douala International. We handle the logistics so your transition from the world to the sanctuary is effortless.

service_list.title: Volcanic Expeditions
service_list.description: Private guided tours to Mount Cameroon and the historic sites of Bimbia. Adventure rooted in deep geographical and social history.

service_list.title: Premium Fleet
service_list.description: Chauffeur-driven or private luxury rentals. High-clearance vehicles maintained to international standards for your regional travels.

service_list.title: The Fisiy Research Library
service_list.description: A private collection of African literature, law, and social science. A quiet sanctuary for deep work, research, and cross-continental dialogue.

bespoke.title: Bespoke Requests
bespoke.description: Our concierge team is trained in diplomatic protocol. Whether you require a private translator, specialized research assistance, or specific dietary logistics, from volcanic soil produce to rare archival materials, we are here to facilitate.

philosophy.title: Rooted in Volcanic Soil,
philosophy.description: Every service we offer is filtered through a lens of cultural integrity and ecological mindfulness. From the vehicles we maintain to the ingredients we source, we prioritize partnerships that uplift local communities and preserve the raw beauty of the Cameroon coastline.

hero.title: Atlantic Gastronomy
hero.description: Our culinary philosophy is simple: honor the volcanic soil that grows our spices, the Atlantic that provides our catch, and the hands that have cultivated these flavors for generations.
hero.subdescription: Every dish tells a story, of farmers who practice terraced agriculture on Mount Cameroon’s slopes, of fishermen who still launch their pirogues by hand, and of recipes passed down through centuries. We invite you to taste Cameroon.
hero.chef_quote: Cooking is an act of love. We put a piece of our land on every plate.

atlantic_gastronomy.experiences_sub: From sunrise coffee to moonlit feasts, choose the setting that suits your mood.

experiences.title: Beachfront Breakfast
experiences.description: Start your day with fresh pastries, tropical fruit, and volcanic coffee steps from the Atlantic.

experiences.title: Sundowner Sessions
experiences.description: Cocktails and small plates as the sun sets over the water, a nightly ritual.

experiences.title: Private Moonlit Dinners
experiences.description: An intimate multi‑course feast on the beach, just for you.

atlantic_gastronomy.menu_sub: A taste of what awaits. Our full menu changes seasonally with the freshest catches and harvests.

chef_table.title: The Chef's Table
chef_table.description: For the ultimate culinary experience, reserve our Chef’s Table. Seated just steps from the open kitchen, you’ll enjoy a custom multi‑course tasting menu crafted by Chef Mireille herself, with wine pairings from our cellar.
features: Interactive experience – ask questions, learn techniques, watch the magic unfold.
Exclusive wine pairings featuring Cameroonian and international labels.
Intimate setting for up to 8 guests – perfect for special celebrations.

testimonials.quote: The most memorable meal of our lives, not just for the food, but for the setting and the stories behind every ingredient.

testimonials.quote: Chef Mireille’s tasting menu is a journey through Cameroon. Don’t miss the plantain crisps with kati‑kati.

atlantic_gastronomy.cta_sub: Whether it’s a romantic dinner, a family celebration, or a business meal, we look forward to hosting you.

hero.description: Your journey begins the moment you land. Our professional chauffeurs and late‑model vehicles ensure your transition from Douala International to Ngeme is seamless, safe, and serene.
hero.subdescription: We track every flight, handle your luggage with care, and provide amenities designed for the traveler who expects more. Whether you're arriving for business or leisure, we set the tone.

diplomatic_transfers.features_sub: More than a ride, we manage every detail so you can arrive refreshed.
features: Flight tracking – we adjust to your schedule

testimonials.quote: After a long flight, stepping into a waiting Ngeme vehicle felt like coming home. Flawless.

testimonials.quote: They handled our group of 12 with multiple stops effortlessly. Truly professional.
testimonials.author: — Dr. Linda T., USA

diplomatic_transfers.cta_sub: Provide your flight details, and we'll be waiting when you arrive.

hero.title: The Fisiy Research Library
hero.description: A sanctuary for the serious mind. Our library houses a private collection of African literature, law, social science, and rare archival materials, curated over decades by Dr. Cyprian Fisiy and colleagues.
hero.subdescription: With reading rooms overlooking the Atlantic, high‑speed internet, and a librarian on hand, it's the perfect environment for deep work, writing, and cross‑continental dialogue.

fisiy_library.collection_sub: A living archive focused on African thought, law, and letters.

services.title: Research Assistance
services.description: Librarians available to help locate materials and navigate databases.

services.title: Digital Access
services.description: High-speed internet and subscriptions to academic journals.

residency.title: Scholar Residencies
residency.description: We offer dedicated workspace and accommodation packages for researchers, writers, and academics. Stay for a week or a month, immerse yourself in the collection and the landscape.
features: Private study carrels with ocean views
Access to rare materials and digital databases
Inclusive meal plan at the resort

fisiy_library.cta_sub: Whether you're a guest at the resort or a scholar seeking a quiet place to work, we welcome you.

hero.title: Ocean-Side Intellectual Talks
hero.description: Where the Atlantic meets the avant‑garde. Our signature series brings together the world's brightest minds for intimate dialogues under the stars. Each session is a deep dive into the ideas shaping our continent and our century, from philosophy and governance to technology and the arts.
hero.subdescription: What began in 2023 as intimate conversations around a fire pit has grown into a globally recognized forum. Past speakers include Nobel laureates, heads of state, and cultural icons, all invited not for their titles, but for their willingness to think out loud, to question orthodoxy, and to engage with our guests as equals.
hero.featured_quote: The future is not something we enter. The future is something we create.

intellectual_talks.experience_sub: We reject the passive auditorium model. Our talks are designed for genuine intellectual exchange, where the distance between speaker and audience dissolves, and ideas flow freely.

experience_features.title: Intimate Setting
experience_features.description: Limited to 30 guests, allowing genuine exchange between audience and speaker. No podiums, no barriers, just chairs arranged in a circle under the stars.

experience_features.title: Global Voices, Local Wisdom
experience_features.description: We deliberately pair international thought leaders with Cameroonian elders, activists, and artists. The result is a dialogue that transcends cultural boundaries.

experience_features.title: Lasting Archive
experience_features.description: Every talk is professionally recorded and made available on our YouTube channel, building a growing library of African intellectual thought for the world.

intellectual_talks.past_talks_sub: Watch full recordings of previous sessions

coming_soon.title: Coming Soon
coming_soon.description: Our inaugural talk series launches in June 2026. We're curating an extraordinary lineup of thinkers, subscribe to be notified.

intellectual_talks.upcoming_sub: Join us under the stars for these upcoming conversations. Space is limited, reservations recommended.

upcoming_events.topic: AI and the Future of African Governance
upcoming_events.speaker: Dr. Fei-Fei Li (via satellite)

upcoming_events.topic: Restorative Justice: Lessons from the Global South
upcoming_events.speaker: Judge Albie Sachs

pastTalks.title: The Future of African Governance: Digital Democracy
pastTalks.speaker: Dr. Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala
pastTalks.description: In this powerful address, Dr. Okonjo-Iweala explores how digital transformation is reshaping governance across the continent, from blockchain voting systems to AI-driven public service delivery. She argues that Africa has a unique opportunity to leapfrog traditional bureaucratic models and build institutions that are more transparent, accountable, and inclusive than those in the West.

pastTalks.title: Planetary Entanglements: Africa in the Anthropocene
pastTalks.speaker: Prof. Achille Mbembe
pastTalks.description: Professor Mbembe delivers a profound meditation on Africa's relationship to the planet, how the continent's ecological wisdom, forged over millennia, offers vital lessons for a world facing climate catastrophe. He challenges the audience to rethink development not as extraction but as reciprocal care between human and non-human worlds.

pastTalks.title: The Danger of a Single Story: Reimagining African Narratives
pastTalks.speaker: Chimamanda Ngozi Adichie
pastTalks.description: Building on her legendary TED Talk, Chimamanda engages in an intimate conversation about the power of stories to shape perceptions, and the responsibility of African writers to tell their own tales. She reads from unpublished work and discusses how literature can heal the wounds of colonial historiography.

pastTalks.title: Restorative Justice: Lessons from Post-Apartheid South Africa
pastTalks.speaker: Judge Albie Sachs
pastTalks.speakerTitle: Former Justice, Constitutional Court of South Africa
pastTalks.description: Judge Sachs shares riveting stories from the Truth and Reconciliation Commission and reflects on how societies torn by conflict can begin to heal. He argues that true justice is not punitive but restorative, a lesson as urgent for divided democracies today as it was in 1994.

pastTalks.title: AI and the Future of African Governance
pastTalks.speaker: Dr. Fei-Fei Li (via satellite)
pastTalks.description: In a historic satellite link, Dr. Li discusses how artificial intelligence can be harnessed for public good, from predicting disease outbreaks to optimizing crop yields. She emphasizes the need for African leadership in shaping AI ethics, ensuring that algorithms reflect the continent's diverse cultures and values.

intellectual_talks.free_note: All talks are complimentary for resort guests. External attendance is available by prior arrangement, please contact our concierge.
intellectual_talks.why_text: In an age of soundbites and algorithms, we believe in the power of slow, sustained thought. The most urgent problems facing Africa and the world, climate change, inequality, democratic backsliding, cannot be solved by quick fixes. They require deep, interdisciplinary dialogue.
intellectual_talks.why_text2: Our talks are designed to model what that dialogue looks like: rigorous, respectful, and radically open. We invite speakers not to deliver a monologue, but to enter into conversation with our guests, with local thinkers, and with the place itself, the volcanic shores of Limbe, where Africa meets the Atlantic.
intellectual_talks.why_text3: Each talk is recorded and archived, creating a growing digital library of African intellectual thought, accessible to anyone, anywhere, for free. Because the conversations that happen here shouldn't end at the water's edge.
intellectual_talks.cta_sub: Whether you're a guest at Ngeme or a scholar visiting Cameroon, we invite you to be part of these transformative evenings. Subscribe to our newsletter for updates on upcoming talks and new video releases.

hero.title: Premium Fleet
hero.description: Explore Cameroon at your own pace with our meticulously maintained fleet of luxury vehicles. Whether you prefer the independence of self‑drive or the insight of a local chauffeur, we provide the wheels for your journey.
hero.subdescription: All vehicles are equipped for the region, high clearance, air conditioning, and modern safety features. We deliver to the resort and handle all paperwork.

premium_fleet.fleet_sub: Choose from our selection of premium vehicles, each maintained to international standards.

services.title: Self-Drive
services.description: For those who prefer independence, fully insured, delivered to the resort.

services.title: Chauffeur-Driven
services.description: Professional local driver who doubles as a guide.

services.title: Regional Travel
services.description: Available for trips to Yaoundé, Kribi, or further.

premium_fleet.cta_sub: Contact our fleet team to check availability and arrange delivery.

hero.title: Volcanic Expeditions
hero.description: Step beyond the resort and into the heart of Cameroon’s geological and cultural wonders. Our private guided tours take you to Mount Cameroon, the highest peak in West Africa, and the historic sites of Bimbia, where the Atlantic meets painful history and resilient memory.
hero.subdescription: Each expedition is led by expert local guides who share not only facts but stories, of volcanic eruptions, of the slave trade, of the flora and fauna that thrive in this unique landscape.

volcanic_expeditions.expeditions_sub: Choose your adventure, each can be customized to your interests and fitness level.
volcanic_expeditions.cta_sub: Contact our expeditions team to plan your private tour. Custom itineraries available.
